content_summary: This file defines a struct called DeviceInfo, which is used to collect and store various information about the user's device. The struct has properties for device-specific information such as vendor identifier, locale identifier, user interface style, screen resolution, device name, device type, memory size, physical memory, CPU count, kernel hostname, OS time zone identifier, OS build, OS version, OS type, OS release, kernel version, boot time, mobile country codes, mobile network codes, mobile network technologies, and local authentication settings. The struct also has a custom initializer for iOS devices.
fingerprint_contribution: The DeviceInfo struct contributes to the final device fingerprint by providing a comprehensive set of device-specific attributes. These attributes can be used to uniquely identify a device and distinguish it from others. The fingerprint can be used for various purposes such as device tracking, analytics, and security.
